title: 2025-12-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 1.22
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-12-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 1.22/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-12-26, the score printed 1.22/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
